description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow enclosed within a rectangular boundary wall, featuring a landscaped front yard with a prominent entry staircase and pathway lined by palm trees. The structure is composed of multiple interconnected rooms with flat roofs, large windows, and several green spaces integrated into the layout. The main entrance is accentuated by a raised platform and steps, leading to a central living area that opens onto a private garden. The property includes a detached small outbuilding, likely a garage or utility shed, positioned outside the main enclosure. The exterior is finished in light, neutral tones with touches of greenery and decorative trees at the corners. The overall design emphasizes open, airy spaces and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat roofs, landscaped entry, and integrated green spaces, enclosed by a boundary wall. Features a prominent front staircase, large windows, and a detached outbuilding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a raised staircase, landscaped pathway, and the full width of the bungalow within its boundary wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the green spaces, palm-lined entry, and the detached outbuilding positioned outside the main enclosure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back garden area, boundary wall, and the bungalow's flat roof structure with visible room divisions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side garden, additional landscaping, and the relationship between the main building and the outbuilding.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and side openings
